title: eryngium coronatum
intro: Eryngium coronatum, also known as the Blue Fleabane or Blue Lobelia, is a flowering plant species in the genus Eryngium, native to the western United States and southern Canada. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Eryngium coronatum include its potential to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Eryngium coronatum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
